title: Grouping by a second dimension
question: Should decisions support a second grouping dimension (like an app screen) beyond phase and topic?
rationale: Add an optional second axis in a generic 'area' field, with _project.json setting its label (e.g. 'Screen'); the viewer then adds a 'By <label>' grouping and filter chips, phase still default. Chosen over reusing category (can't hold two things) or hardcoding 'screen' (bakes an app concept into a generic tool).

options.label: Optional project-labelled second axis, with grouping + filter

tradeoffs.note: a decision can be filed under a topic and a screen at once
a 'By <label>' grouping mode plus filter chips to jump to or isolate one
the project names the axis; it's invisible when unset
adds a third grouping mode and a chip row

options.label: Reuse the category field as the screen

tradeoffs.note: one field can't be both a topic and a screen
bakes an app concept into a tool used by non-app projects
